name: Spinach Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup hot pepper (jalapeno or your choice), chopped
6 cups fresh spinach or 1 package frozen
2 cups cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium heat, sauté onion and garlic in oil until golden.
2. Stir in peppers and cook for 3 minutes.
3. Rinse spinach in water, transfer to the skillet with water still clinging.
4. Stir and cover; cook until wilted.
5. Meanwhile, soften tortillas in an oven by wrapping them in a moist towel or foil.
6. Place 1/4 cup filling in the center of each tortilla.
7. Roll up each tortilla, placing the seam side down in an oiled oven-proof dish.
8. Smother with salsa and cheese.
9. Bake at 350°F until heated and bubbly.
